output.model_sql:
WITH transactions AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ ref('fct_transaction') }}
),
venues AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ ref('dim_venue') }}
),
final AS (
    SELECT
        t.EVENT_ID,
        t.EVENT_DATE,
        v.VENUE_NAME,
        v.CITY,
        v.STATE,
        SUM(t.GMS) AS total_gms,
        COUNT(t.TRANSACTION_ID) AS transaction_count
    FROM transactions t
    JOIN venues v ON t.VENUE_ID = v.VENUE_ID
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
)
SELECT * FROM final

decision_log.decision: Read model SQL and identified JOIN structure
decision_log.rationale: Model joins fct_transaction to dim_venue on VENUE_ID. The fanout suggests duplicates in dim_venue on VENUE_ID (possibly SCD Type 2 with multiple active rows).
